events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed the pressure-testing setup as compliant — pre-task photos show the exclusion zone, guards, and access controls staged per plan, with a signed briefing and no active exposure. Wrote a `pass` / low-risk decision to `/app/answer.json`, with standard ASME B31.3 §345 continuing controls (exclusion zone, calibrated gauges, controlled pressurization) listed as required actions before and during the actual test.
